data.title: Infor expands AI portfolio with industry-specific agents
data.description: Industry analysts view Infor’s latest move as part of a larger shift toward AI-enabled enterprise software.

data.title: Coupa makes an acquisition in AI for supplier discovery
data.description: The acquisition will integrate Scoutbee’s AI-driven search, supplier data and collaboration tools with Coupa’s total spend management platform and its network of more than 10 million buyers and suppliers.

data.title: Lowe’s closes FBM acquisition to expand digital reach in Pro market
data.description: Beyond its physical network, FBM brings digital tools that will strengthen Lowe’s B2B ecommerce capabilities.

data.title: Gap taps Google Cloud for AI to boost ecommerce, internal operations
data.description: Among the key benefits Gap anticipates from using Google Cloud's AI tech are product innovation and customer experience and marketing optimization.

data.title: Stitch Fix Vision brings new generative AI-powered try-on options
data.description: Shoppers will be able to use Stitch Fix Vision to see how they look in current styles and curated outfits.
